Document:
# Adding New Skills
This guide walks you through adding a new skill tree to OpenEdge 14.
## Overview
A skill tree consists of: 1. Skill prototypes (define tiers and what they grant) 2. Species prototype update (add the tree to a species) 3. Optional stat modifiers
## Step 1: Create Skill Prototypes
Create a new file in [mono]Resources/Prototypes/_OE14/Skills/[/mono]:
- type: OE14SkillPrototype id: MySkillT1 name: My Skill I tier: 1 pointCost: 1 grants: - SpellMyAbility statModifiers: Strength: 1
- type: OE14SkillPrototype id: MySkillT2 name: My Skill II tier: 2 pointCost: 2 requires: MySkillT1 grants: - SpellMyBetterAbility statModifiers: Strength: 1
- type: OE14SkillPrototype id: MySkillT3 name: My Skill III tier: 3 pointCost: 3 requires: MySkillT2 grants: - SpellMyBestAbility statModifiers: Strength: 1
## Step 2: Add to Species
Find the species prototype in [mono]Resources/Prototypes/_OE14/Species/[/mono] and add the skill tree:
- type: OE14CharacterStats id: HumanStats skillTrees: - id: ExistingTree - id: MyNewSkillTree # Add here
## Step 3: Define the Spells
For each spell granted by the skill, see [textlink="Adding New Spells" link="OE14_DEV_Guide_Spells"].
## Step 4: Test
1. Build: [mono]dotnet build[/mono] 2. Start server and client 3. Create a character with the updated species 4. Open the skill tree and verify tiers are visible 5. Spend points and verify spell appears in action bar
## Content Under Construction
More detailed guide with full examples coming soon.
